handoff_meta.purpose: Hand off to another workspace (Cowork) to finish deploying /stores, /quiz, /layering pages to the live tiby.shop site.
handoff_meta.summary_one_line: Code is fully written and pushed to a shadow repo; need someone with write access to the real repo jaelee1982/tiby-shop-v2 to copy the files in and push to master.

commits_on_shadow_master: aab0a7f add /stores page with 219 Don Quijote locations, fix tiby.me links

hosting_signals.dns: tiby.shop -> 75.2.60.5 (appears to be Netlify/CloudFront edge IP)
hosting_signals.note: Live hosting config was not directly verifiable from the sandbox. Netlify dashboard needs to be checked manually to confirm where tiby.shop deploys from.

what_was_blocked.title: Could not fetch tiby.me or tiby.shop directly
what_was_blocked.reason: Sandbox egress proxy blocks arbitrary hosts. HTTP responses like `host_not_allowed` were from the proxy, not from the real servers. Only github.com-style hosts were whitelisted.
what_was_blocked.impact: Could not read the original tiby.me/stores, /quiz, /layering HTML to port directly.

what_was_blocked.title: tiby.me appears to be deprovisioned
what_was_blocked.reason: DNS still points to Netlify but the domain returns 403 host_not_allowed when I tested (even accounting for sandbox proxy, the subdomain guesses like tiby.netlify.app, tibyme.netlify.app all failed).
what_was_blocked.impact: Could not scrape original page content as a fallback.

what_was_blocked.title: No Netlify / Supabase / Railway MCP connected
what_was_blocked.reason: Only Gmail, Google Calendar, Google Drive, and GitHub MCPs were available in this session.
what_was_blocked.impact: Could not query a Supabase `stores` table or trigger a Netlify deploy or inspect Netlify site configuration.

what_was_blocked.title: GitHub MCP scope was locked to jaelee82/tiby-shop
what_was_blocked.reason: The authenticated MCP user is `jaelee82` (a shadow/bot account with 1 public repo), NOT the user's real `jaelee1982` account. System prompt explicitly restricts: "Calls targeting repositories outside this list will be denied."
what_was_blocked.impact: All pushes went to jaelee82/tiby-shop. Live site at tiby.shop is served from a different repo (jaelee1982/tiby-shop-v2) that I cannot touch.
what_was_blocked.evidence: GitHub MCP get_me returned login=jaelee82. Gmail notifications say 'Hey jaelee1982!'. User confirmed via GitHub Desktop screenshot: real repo is tiby-shop-v2 under jaelee1982.

stores_219.region_enrichment: Cross-referenced each store_code against `sales_data/Tiby在庫あり.xlsx` (fileId: 1vw9uBLDkcpOLxwJOL7TwDurq0hX-4Z16) which had エリア (region) info, then grouped sub-areas into 7 top-level regions

layering_456.content: 456 famous perfumes from 89 brands with scent axes (sweet/woody/fresh/musk 1-4), longevity, intensity, main_family, top/mid/base notes
layering_456.notes: Encoding was dual (ASCII + some Japanese col that was corrupted in transit) so the Japanese description column was dropped; English fields came through clean

brand_reference.used_for: Fragrance profiles, tagline, TPO mapping, persona; drove the quiz copy and the TIBY 3-SKU entries in layering.json

files_added.description: Stores page with 219 stores embedded inline as JSON. Region tabs (All / 北海道 / 東北 / 関東 / 中部 / 関西 / 中国・四国 / 九州・沖縄). Text search over name/code/sub_area. Grouped render with store code + display name.
3-question scent quiz. Each answer carries weights { love, hug, kiss }; total score picks the recommended SKU. Shows recommended SKU with tagline/notes and the other two as runner-ups.
questions: Q1: どんな日に、香りを纏いたいですか？ (Date / Daily / Night / Weekend)
Q2: どんな雰囲気が、あなたの魅力？ (Sweet / Warm / Confident / Clean)
Q3: 好きな香りは、どれに近い？ (Floral Fruity / Sweet Woody / Fruity Floral / Fresh Citrus)

files_added.description: Fragrance matching tool. Fetches /data/layering.json. Searchable + family-filtered list of 456 perfumes. Clicking one opens a modal with scent profile bars, top/mid/base notes, and a compatibility score against each TIBY SKU.
files_added.matching_algorithm: Match score = max(0, 100 - diff*8 + family_bonus) where diff = sum(|frag[axis] - sku[axis]|) over sweet/woody/fresh/musk; +5 if main_family_simple matches. Highest-scoring SKU gets the ★ BEST MATCH badge.

files_added.description: Source-of-truth for stores (redundant since stores/index.html embeds it inline, but kept for future maintenance). Schema: [{ code:int, name:str, name_display:str, sub_area:str, region:str }]
Fragrance DB + TIBY 3-SKU profiles. Schema: { tiby: [...], fragrances: [...], meta: {...} }. layering/index.html fetches this at runtime.

files_modified.change: Replaced https://tiby.me/stores, /quiz, /layering links with same-origin /stores, /quiz, /layering. Fixed one footer link that pointed bare tiby.me → now /layering for 'レイヤリングラボ' label. Removed target="_blank" for same-origin links.

design_decisions.url_scheme: Clean URLs via folder/index.html (so /stores, /quiz, /layering work without .html extension, which also works fine on GitHub Pages + Netlify + most static hosts).
design_decisions.design_language: Reused the existing tiby.shop design: --black #0a0a0a, Cormorant Garamond for display, Josefin Sans for UI, Zen Maru Gothic for Japanese body. Brand colors --love #F4A0A0 / --hug #7EC8B5 / --kiss #A78BBF. CSS variables so the future Claude Tiby Design System can re-skin without touching structure.
design_decisions.why_embedded_stores_but_not_layering: stores.json is 25KB (small enough to inline, avoids a fetch on first paint). layering.json is 130KB with 456 entries, so it's fetched async so the initial page loads fast.
design_decisions.no_framework: Everything is vanilla HTML/CSS/JS, no build step. Works as-is on any static host.
known_trade_offs: Layering match score is a simple distance heuristic over 4 axes, not a full fragrance ontology. Good enough for a recommendation UI, will need tuning if the brand wants strict perfumery rules.

Quiz questions and weights were derived from brand guidelines TPO mapping (Date→LOVE, Daily→HUG, Night→KISS) and emotion mapping (Act1/Act2/Act3). The original tiby.me/quiz logic couldn't be recovered; user said it was 'simple logic, easy to re-implement' — this is a clean rewrite in that spirit.
HUG ME ME box still says 'チョコレート' externally, but per brand guidelines that wording is being retired in favor of 'シトラス&バニラ'. Current copy follows the guidelines.

how_to_finish_deploying.goal: Get the code from jaelee82/tiby-shop (shadow) onto the master branch of whatever repo actually feeds tiby.shop (assumed jaelee1982/tiby-shop-v2).

steps: git cherry-pick aab0a7f a51eba3   # only the two new commits; alternatively: git merge shadow/master --allow-unrelated-histories
File → Clone Repository → URL: https://github.com/jaelee82/tiby-shop  → clone to a temp folder
In Explorer: copy the 6 items (stores/, quiz/, layering/, data/, index.html, love-me-me.html, hug-me-me.html, kiss-me-me.html) from the temp folder
Paste them into the local folder of tiby-shop-v2, overwriting when prompted
Back in GitHub Desktop with tiby-shop-v2 selected, the changes show up. Commit with message: 'add /stores, /quiz, /layering pages + fix tiby.me links' → Push origin

option_3_cross_repo_pr.condition: Only works if jaelee82/tiby-shop is a fork of jaelee1982/tiby-shop-v2 on GitHub (unconfirmed).
steps: Pull requests → New pull request → base: jaelee1982/tiby-shop-v2 master, compare: jaelee82/tiby-shop master
If the UI allows the cross-repo compare, create PR and merge.

post_deploy_verification: Open https://tiby.shop/stores — should show region-tabbed grid of 219 stores.
Open https://tiby.shop/quiz — should show the 'Start' screen; going through 3 questions should land on a SKU.
Open https://tiby.shop/layering — should load a search grid after a brief fetch; clicking a fragrance opens the modal with TIBY scores.
Spot-check that index.html header nav + product page CTA buttons no longer point to tiby.me.

open_questions_for_next_session: Is jaelee1982/tiby-shop-v2 actually the repo that feeds tiby.shop? Confirm by checking Netlify (app.netlify.com → site claiming tiby.shop → Build & deploy → repo).

Should tiby.me redirect to tiby.shop? Right now tiby.me seems dead; a redirect would preserve external links (in Powder Room campaigns, Kirindo emails, etc.). If yes, this needs DNS + Netlify config, not repo code.
Do you want to persist store data to Supabase so store lists can be updated without code deploys? If so, the stores/ page can switch to fetching from Supabase instead of embedded JSON.
Quiz recommendation logic vs the original tiby.me/quiz — does the current mapping match your intent? Easy to re-tune (just edit the `w` weights in quiz/index.html).

session_artifacts_in_shadow_sandbox_only.note: These exist only in the sandbox and the jaelee82/tiby-shop repo; if Cowork needs them, pull from the shadow repo or regenerate.
